name: SSL/HTTPS
description: Enable HTTPS via nginx reverse proxy, native app configuration, or certificate provisioning only.

parameters.name: SSL Mode
parameters.description: Proxy: nginx reverse proxy handles HTTPS. Native: app configures HTTPS itself. Certs: only provision certificates (no ports, no proxy).

parameters.name: HTTP Port
parameters.description: The HTTP port of the application to be proxied.

parameters.name: HTTPS Port
parameters.description: The HTTPS port to listen on.

parameters.name: Server Certificate
parameters.description:
Optional PEM server certificate for HTTPS.
- If left empty, a certificate is **auto-generated** by the internal CA
- Upload your own `.pem` or `.crt` file to use a custom certificate
- The certificate is stored as `cert.pem` in the certificate directory
- The HTTPS configuration persists across container restarts

parameters.name: Server Private Key
parameters.description:
Optional PEM private key matching the server certificate.
- If left empty, a key is **auto-generated** together with the certificate
- Upload your own `.pem` or `.key` file to use a custom private key
- The key is stored as `privkey.pem` in the certificate directory

parameters.name: Certificate Directory
parameters.description: Volume key and optional subdirectory for certificates (format: volume_key[:subdirectory]). If empty, uses the default 'certs' volume.
